---
title: "Team B: MSW Oscillations"
lang: en
format:
  html:
    toc: true
---

# Goal

Build the survival probability $P_{ee}(E)$ for solar neutrinos in a two-flavor MSW model.

# Input Data

- `data/electron_density_profile_toy.csv`
- `src/solar_neutrino/oscillations.py`
- `notebooks/02_msw_survival_probability.ipynb`

# What to Plot

- toy electron-density profile;
- $P_{ee}(E)$ on $0.1-15$ MeV;
- comparison for at least two values of $\theta_{12}$.

# What to Explain

- low-energy vacuum-averaged limit;
- high-energy MSW-dominated limit;
- resonance condition $2EV_e=\Delta m^2\cos2\theta$;
- why this is still a toy two-flavor treatment.

# What to Submit

- notebook with $P_{ee}(E)$;
- one defense slide with formula and plot;
- statement of the approximations.

# Minimum Result

A $P_{ee}(E)$ plot and the numerical low/high-energy limits.

# Advanced Task

Scan $\sin^2\theta_{12}$ and $\Delta m^2_{21}$, then show how $P_{ee}(E)$ changes.
